name: Graham Cracker Pie
recipeInstructions:
FOR THE CRUST:
Mix the dry ingredients together in a bowl. Add the melted shortening and stir until combined.
Use half of this mixture to line an 8 or 9-inch pie pan, pressing it evenly onto the bottom and sides with your fingers.
Save the remaining half of the mixture for topping the filling.
FOR THE FILLING:
Combine egg yolks and milk in a double boiler. Cook over low heat until thickened, stirring constantly.
In another bowl, mix sugar and cornstarch to form a slurry. Add this to the egg yolk mixture, stirring continuously.
Add vanilla and stir until smooth.
Allow the filling to cool slightly before pouring it into the prepared pie crust.
Top with meringue (whipped egg whites mixed with a pinch of salt).
Sprinkle the reserved crumb mixture over the top.
Bake at 400°F until the merengue is lightly browned, about 5 to 10 minutes. Cool for several hours (at least 2) before serving.
Serves: 6 to 8
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV, ed. 1974
